description_long: This office building features a modern, angular roofline with multiple peaks and a prominent central glass atrium. The facade combines a warm, tan lower section with a dark, grid-patterned upper section, creating a striking visual contrast. Large, rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged along the sides, while the front and rear elevations include recessed balconies protected by overhanging eaves. The main entrance is accessed via a short staircase and is framed by tall, narrow windows. The building sits on a flat, black base, suggesting a foundation or plinth. The overall design emphasizes geometric forms and clean lines, typical of contemporary commercial architecture.
description: A modern office building with a peaked roof, glass atrium, and a mix of tan and dark grid-patterned facades, featuring large windows and a prominent front entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the angular roofline, glass atrium, and recessed balconies above a tan facade with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the grid-patterned dark facade, three tall windows, and the main entrance with a staircase.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the same peaked roof, glass atrium, and balcony features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a similar grid-patterned facade, two tall windows, and a secondary entrance with steps.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced rectangular windows in horizontal rows, with symmetrical placement on both main facades and tall, narrow windows flanking entrances.
attribute_building_entrance_type: single door with side windows and staircase
